name: Kamakiri
description:
__Height:__ 214 cm (7')
__Affiliations:__ Shandia
**First Appearance:** Chapter 249; Episode 151

Kamakiri is one of the Shandian warriors that fought to take Upper Yard from Eneru. Kamakiri seems to be one of Wiper's most trusted fighters and is also good friends with Laki and Aisa, acting much kinder than the other warriors. He used a sickle and Burn Blade as a weapons.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
